case_title: FIELDS, DARLENE M. VS RENE, LOUISE H., CITY ATTORNEY et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $300.00 FILED BY FIELDS, DARLENE M. AS TO DEFENDANT RENE, LOUISE H., CITY ATTORNEY DEPT. OF PUBLIC WORKS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-21-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
